title: Simply a BareBones combat combat add on
description: Simply a Bare Bones combat combat add on
body:
Simply a Bare Bones combat combat add on
Changes textures to be better suited for combat
Including 
- 	Crosshair change
- 	Hot bar change
- 	Lower shield in 1. person
- 	Lower fire/soul fire
- 	Clearer water
- 	Lower Swords
- 	Lower axes
- 	Clearer pumpkin blur
- 	Shorter arrows
- 	Fishing rod
- 	Crossbow
- 	Crossbow w/firework
- 	Bow
- 	Clearer grass block outline
- 	Golden Helmet -> Crown
- 	Turtle Helmet -> Diving mask
- 	Round moon'n Sun
- 	Leafy Wooden tools
- 	Leafy stick
- 	Kaktus Totem
- 	TNT!
